title: MemoryEntry
description: A single key-value record in scoped CHP agent memory.

key.description: The memory key within the scope.

scope.description: Memory scope: session (ephemeral to one session), project (shared within a project), user (cross-project, future).

scope_id.description: Identifier qualifying the scope (e.g. session_id or project path). Empty string means unscoped within the scope type.

value.description: The stored value. Any JSON-serialisable type.

created_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp when the entry was first written.

updated_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp when the entry was last updated.
